subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Make mention of him who hath been named 'Alí-Áqá, that he may rejoice in that which the Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken in his name, and that which God hath made a light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی اذکر من سمی بعلی آقا لیفرح بما تحرک لسان العظمه باسمه و انزل له ما جعله الله نورا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @Greatest Name
